title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
